pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade maven-compiler-plugin to a version that supports Java 21 compilation features.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older versions of maven-compiler-plugin may not support compiling code targeting Java 21 or may lack necessary bug fixes for newer language features.

pom.xml.general_idea: Replace separate source and target configuration with the unified release configuration for modern Java compilation.
pom.xml.why_exists: Using source/target with Java 21 can lead to mismatched class file versions or missing module path support; release is the standard for Java 9+.
